chapter_title.ar: باب مِيرَاثِ الْأَبَوَيْنِ مَعَ الْإِخْوَةِ وَ الْأَخَوَاتِ لِأَبٍ وَ الْإِخْوَةِ وَ الْأَخَوَاتِ لِأُمٍّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – Inheritance of the two parents with the brothers and sisters of the father, and the brothers and sisters of the mother

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/140)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/140)
text: إِذَا تَرَكَ الْمَيِّتُ أَخَوَيْنِ فَهُمْ إِخْوَةٌ مَعَ الْمَيِّتِ حَجَبَا الْأُمَّ عَنِ الثُّلُثِ وَ إِنْ كَانَ وَاحِداً لَمْ يَحْجُبِ الْأُمَّ وَ قَالَ إِذَا كُنَّ أَرْبَعَ أَخَوَاتٍ حَجَبْنَ الْأُمَّ عَنِ الثُّلُثِ لِأَنَّهُنَّ بِمَنْزِلَةِ الْأَخَوَيْنِ وَ إِنْ كُنَّ ثَلَاثاً لَمْ يَحْجُبْنَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from sa’ad Bin Abu Khalaf, from Abu Al Abbas,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the deceased leaves two brothers, so they are brothers with the deceased, they both veil the mother from the third. And if there was one, he would not veil the mother’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When there are four sisters, they would block the mother from the third because they are at the statues of the two brothers, and if there were three sisters, they would not be blocking (the mother from the third)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sa‘d ibn abu Khalaf from abu al-‘Abbas who has narrated the following: “Abu "Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, "If a deceased leaves behind two brothers, they are considered more than two brothers of the deceased and they bar the mother from one-third. If there is one brother he does not bar the mother.’ He (the Imam) said, "If there are four sisters they bar the mother from one-third because they are like two brothers but if there are three sisters they do not bar the mother’s share.’”
